steps.title: Intake and inventory
steps.instructions: Record it in AssetMost with serial and IMEI; issue the asset tag.
steps.record: Device in inventory with tag, serial, IMEI, carrier/number if any.

steps.title: MDM enrollment
steps.why: An unmanaged phone with company mail is a breach in a pocket.
steps.instructions: Type /mdm in this SOP to name your MDM. Android Enterprise (work profile for BYOD, fully managed for company-owned).
steps.done_when: Device appears in the MDM console and receives policy.

steps.title: Passcode and encryption policy applied
steps.done_when: MDM shows passcode set and encryption on; remote wipe armed.

steps.title: Company apps via MDM
steps.instructions: Push mail, chat, and the role's apps through the MDM - no personal store sign-ins for company apps.

steps.title: Hand-off
steps.instructions: Assign to the person in AssetMost; confirm mail and MFA prompts work on the device.
steps.done_when: The user - not the tech - signs into mail and passes an MFA prompt.
steps.record: Device shows its holder; number recorded.
